ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's progress */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "current_level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player in the game */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the player in the game */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date and time when the player last played the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_progress_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the achievement was earned */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who earned the achievement */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template used for the achievement */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date and time when the achievement was achieved */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating points assigned to the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the leaderboard */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player in the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by player in the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the achievement rated */,
  "rating_points" INTEGER /* Points given in the rating */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text for the rating */,
  "rated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rated_by FOREIGN KEY ("rated_by") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Player, Developer, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "developer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the game developer */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game developed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_developers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "role_id")
)
